titleStmt.title: SII 31.237: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 237. (A.R. No. B 251 of 1938.) MĪRĀPURAM, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On one of the beams in the mukha-maṇḍapa of the Rāmaliṅgēśvara temple.
It is dated in Śaka 166(9), Akshaya, Phālguṇa, ba. 15, corresponding to February 28, Saturday 1747 A.D.

It is a dharma śāsanam and registers the gift of lands and gardens to Śrī Mallāla sēku for maintaining the daily, fortnight and monthly festivals and also daily offerings to the god Rāmalingasvāmi at Mīrāpuram by the adhikāris, Reḍḍikaraṇans of Mīrāpuram. The signatories of the record are Śrīpati rājavaradaya, Rājagōpālu, Krishṇya and same gift (?) is said to have been to the sculptors Veṁkatarāmuḍu and Vumāmahēśvaralu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaṣaṁbulu 166(9) Aganēṭi Akṣaya nāma saṁvatsara phālguṇa ba 15 lu śrīmallālasēku
laku mīrāpuraṁ rāmaliṁgasvāmiki nityōtsava pakṣōtsava māsōtsavavālaku mīrāpuraṁ Adhikārireḍḍi karaṇālu vrāyiṁcci yiccina bhū
dāna dharmaśāsanaṁ patrika cēnu yi mā niveṁppu 20 cēnu Ê 2 yidduṁ cēnu nitya Ākhaṁḍānaku tū¨rpputōṁṭala kō nāvulu guḍiṁ ce Ö . va
kunuku 2 yiccināraṁ . yī prakāraṁ nityanaivēdyālaku Akhaṁḍānkunaḍi mībhaktulanu kāpāḍukuṁcu vaccēdi ślōkaṁ . sva
dattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānu pālanaṁ paradattāpaharēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
śrīpatirājavaradaya vrālu rājugōpālu kriṣṇayavrālu śilpi veṁkaḍrāmuḍu vumāmahēśvarulaku
Digital edition of SII 31.237 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
